title: Marriott India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Marriott India is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marriott India! We are hiring a Guest Relations Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marriott India:
Marriott India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Revenue Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marriott India!
